title: ZKasino - Rekt
relevance_summary: Rug pull involving sudden token conversion and lack of transparency

prevention.rule: Block any tx that converts large amounts of ETH to custom tokens without user interaction.
prevention.trigger: ETH -> custom token conversion in single tx with large ETH amount

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that converts large amounts of ETH to custom tokens without user interaction.
summary: ZKasino executed a rug pull by converting over 10,500 ETH ($33 million) into custom tokens without user consent. A guard could have detected this by blocking any transaction that converts large amounts of ETH to custom tokens in a single transaction.
